expectations.evidence: Explains that the task is alive but blocked on an interactive prompt.

expectations.text: Prioritizes inspecting the existing task before rerunning
expectations.evidence: Tells the reader not to start a duplicate task and to inspect the existing window first.

expectations.text: Keeps focus on handling flow rather than command overload
expectations.evidence: Centers the answer on the decision flow and uses only a few representative commands.

expectations.text: Explains the likely next action clearly
expectations.evidence: Clearly says to inspect first, then send y/n based on what the prompt means.
